rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Register match.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Over-hedge detector.
Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream.
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 125-129: 'Better safe than sorry is a professional answer. The useful move is not pretending the agent resolved the judgment call. The useful move is arriving with the work already done, so the expert can answer a narrower question.' Imports positioning-defense (methodology superiority, governance discipline) into body. Not Sutherland-negation serving the learner.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Reframe as Sutherland negation: name the student's instinct (skip experts, self-resolve), show why it misfires here. Lead with the work done (reports, mitigation) as evidence next move is sound judgment WITH humans, not agent-fantasy.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
Earn every technical term on first use.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
No placeholders inside fenced blocks.
Every prompt block gets a one-sentence action lead-in.
rules_evaluated.evidence: 21-28: text preceding prompt is explanation ('The CLI auto-loads...') not action lead-in. Missing lead-in for Phase 1 prompt.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add before **Prompt** label: 'Install the authored security skill as a standalone CLI tool by copying it to `~/.claude/skills/`.'

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.
Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
Artifact destinations are explicit subpaths, never naked filenames (Bootstrap-specific).
Mood contract named.
Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode.
